title: Rhodiola bouvieri
taxonomy: Rhodiola bouvieri belongs to the family Crassulaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the stonecrop or orpine family. This species is native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States and northern Mexico.
